lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in immaculate, showroom-quality condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, free from any chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and retains its original factory luster. Inside, the interior is pristine, with the leather seats and trim showing no signs of wear or aging. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly, with every system functioning as new. It has been garage-kept and has a complete, documented service history from the dealership. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that is indistinguishable from a brand-new model.

Get ready for your next adventure with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition and has been treated with care, showing just light, normal wear. This car drives smoothly and remains a dependable choice that you can count on. It’s a solid, attractive option for anyone looking for quality and reliability at a great value!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show visible signs of wear and some cosmetic damage. All mechanical systems are operational, though the car would benefit from routine maintenance.

This car is in poor condition and is recommended for someone looking for a project or parts vehicle. It has significant mechanical issues, including a head gasket leak and a failing alternator. The body shows its age with substantial rust along the rocker panels, several large dents, and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy use, with ripped upholstery, stained carpeting, and a non-functional air conditioning system. It is being sold as-is and will require a trailer for transport.
Fair condition.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional, though the vehicle may require mechanical attention or maintenance.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Meticulously maintained and showing clear evidence of consistent care, this model offers a refined driving experience and exceptional long-term value. It stands as a premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, well-appointed automobile that balances performance with sophisticated presentation.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride that's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. It's the perfect fit for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks and feels great on the road. It runs super smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! Drop me a message if you want to come by and take it for a spin!
This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a driver-oriented example featuring the high-revving S54 3.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Minor wear. Runs well. Priced to sell.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive form both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, expected signs of road use, while the interior is exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and features fully functional electronics and climate control. Mechanically, it delivers a smooth, responsive ride with a documented service history that ensures peace of mind. It is a reliable, well-cared-for example that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. Having recently undergone a full multi-point inspection, it is ready for the road with no immediate maintenance required.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, this unit offers a refined driving experience. The interior remains well-preserved, complementing a robust drivetrain that has been thoroughly vetted for reliability. An exceptional acquisition for those prioritizing quality and professional upkeep.

This distinguished pre-owned vehicle exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. Presented in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience and a sophisticated aesthetic profile. Prospective owners will appreciate the balance of performance and reliability inherent in this well-preserved example. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value.

Hey there! I'm so excited to find a new home for this awesome ride! It's been such a reliable companion and is still in great shape for all your upcoming adventures. I've taken really good care of it, and it drives like a dream. You’re going to love how smooth it feels on the road! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to tell you more about it!

Power is delivered via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and managed by a speed-sensing variable M differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from preventative rear subframe reinforcement and a recent refresh of the trailing arm bushings. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

Offered here is a well-maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior paint is vibrant and clean, showing only the lightest signs of daily use, while the interior has been preserved in excellent shape with no tears in the upholstery and a fully functional dashboard suite. Under the hood, the engine runs strong and quiet, benefiting from a documented service history and a recent brake service. Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure optimal performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a robust powertrain, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking both value and sophistication. We invite serious inquiries to experience this well-preserved automobile firsthand.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and having passed our comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits the refined mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal expected of a high-caliber pre-owned selection. This offering combines sophisticated styling with proven durability, ensuring an elevated driving experience for its next owner.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and looks great—honestly, you're going to love how it handles on the road. Come take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sound BMW E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54B32 high-revving inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. This specimen utilizes the Getrag 226 six-speed manual gearbox, delivering power to the rear wheels via the M Variable Differential Lock. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and refreshed dampers, maintaining the platform's legendary lateral grip and steering feedback. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain exhibits excellent compression and linear power delivery, making it an ideal candidate for the discerning driver seeking peak analog performance.
Used car. Good condition throughout. Clean interior. Runs well. Regularly serviced.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a perfect blend of executive luxury and spirited performance. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, complemented by premium alloy wheels wrapped in tires with excellent tread remaining. Inside, the leather interior is smoke-free and remarkably clean, showing only light, natural wear on the driver’s seat bolster consistent with careful ownership. All technological features, including the navigation and premium sound system, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, supported by a comprehensive service history from certified technicians. While there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper from highway commuting, the car presents beautifully and drives with the tightness and precision of a much newer vehicle. This is a reliable, turn-key luxury car ready for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced fusion of sophistication and dependable engineering, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this selection exemplifies our commitment to automotive excellence and long-term reliability.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new adventure! It’s been super well-loved and is in really solid shape, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It drives like a dream and has plenty of life left in it—honestly, it's just a great, honest car that's ready to hit the road with you today. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded bushings, ensuring the variable M differential lock translates every bit of torque to the tarmac. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment, preserving the high-revving integrity of the valvetrain. While showing minor patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain razor-sharp.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition for its age. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor, age-appropriate road wear, while the interior is remarkably clean, featuring smoke-free upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it should, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular oil changes and scheduled service. It’s a reliable, well-cared-for example that offers a perfect balance of performance and value. Ready for the road with no immediate maintenance required, this car is prepared for its next long-term owner.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring consistent performance and a refined driving experience. A premier acquisition for the discerning professional seeking reliability without compromise.
